data.title: Looking At KE Holdings's Recent Unusual Options Activity
Eli Lilly Sues Some Vendors For Unauthorized Sale Of Fake Weight-Loss Drug
data.description: Eli Lilly sues vendors for selling unauthorized tirzepatide amid resolved shortages. Lawsuits target vendors offering counterfeit versions of Zepbound and Mounjaro

data.title: Nvidia Joins Big Tech Hyperscalers At HLTH Conference, Partners With Microsoft To Drive AI Innovations
data.description: Tech companies showcase AI solutions for healthcare at HLTH conference in Las Vegas, aiming to ease burden on professionals and tap into $6.8 trillion industry. Microsoft and Nvidia expand partnership to support AI startups in healthcare with cloud credits, technical assistance and access to cutting-edge tools.

data.title: What's Going On With Bright Minds Biosciences Stock?
data.description: Bright Minds Biosciences Inc (NASDAQ:DRUG) shares are trading higher again after soaring last week. The company on Monday announced a new collaboration with brain health-focused AI company Firefly Neuroscience.

data.title: Kirkland's Stock Is Moving Higher Monday: What's Going On?
data.description: Kirkland's Inc (NASDAQ:KIRK) shares are trading higher Monday after the company announced that Bed Bath & Beyond owner Beyond Inc (NYSE:BYON) will invest $25 million in the company.
